items.title: Board UX: persist active saved-view chip state in toolbar
items.description: Make saved-view chips indicate current match to improve orientation on board.

items.title: Settings: add board-to-settings advanced-controls shortcut card
items.description: UI strike follow-up to keep board focused while preserving quick access to advanced controls.

items.title: Navigation: add compact board quick-jump between /board and /settings
items.description: Keep board primary while making advanced controls reachable with one tap.
